_comment: Fleet node models (32GB RAM, CPU-only Linux). No cloud providers — all cloud requests route through A2A bridge to orchestrator. No MLX models — Apple Silicon only. Updated 2026-06-23: qwen3.5:35b-a3b replaces openbmb/minicpm-o2.6:8b as flagship. MoE model — 3B active per token, 10.4 tok/s on CPU, multimodal (text+image+video+audio), tools+thinking.
_hardware: 32GB RAM, CPU-only (no GPU). i7-10710U 12c. For: fnet3, fnet4, fnet5, fnet6.
_cloud_routing: Fleet nodes have NO direct cloud API access. Cloud requests go through A2A bridge to orchestrator. model-router.json uses 'cloud-via-a2a' placeholder for cloud routes.

models.name: Qwen 3.5 35B MoE (A3B)
models._note: Flagship — MoE 36B total/3B active, 10.4 tok/s CPU, tools+thinking+vision. 23GB disk. Replaces minicpm-o2.6:8b. Multimodal input (text+image+video+audio via Ollama). Benchmarked 2026-06-23 on fnet3.
Fast/lightweight tier — 4.7B dense, 8.9 tok/s CPU, tools+thinking+vision. 3.4GB disk. maxTokens 4096 per MAX-TOKENS-GUIDE.
General purpose local model — Gemma 3 4B, non-reasoning, 128K ctx, vision capable. 3.3GB disk.
Nomic embed text v1.5 — 768 dims (Matryoshka to 256), 8K context. 274MB, runs on CPU. For ChromaDB embedding pipeline.
Whisper STT — local speech-to-text based on OpenAI Whisper. 2GB. Community model. For STT pipeline.
Orpheus TTS English Q4 — local text-to-speech, 8 voices, emotional tags. 2.4GB Q4_K_M. For TTS pipeline.
